title: Now Hiring Store Manager at PC Jeweller

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at PC Jeweller
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with PC Jeweller! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Ranchi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About PC Jeweller:
PC Jeweller is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PC Jeweller!
